Our professional ant control services target carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants common throughout this central Staten Island neighborhood. We provide comprehensive treatments that eliminate colonies and prevent future invasions in West Brighton homes and businesses.

Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly treatments safe for families and pets, backed by our satisfaction guarantee and follow-up inspections to ensure complete ant elimination.
localContext: West Brighton's mix of older single-family homes and apartment buildings near the Staten Island Expressway creates ideal conditions for ant activity, particularly during warm months when colonies seek food and water indoors. Properties near Clove Lakes Park and the heavily trafficked Forest Avenue commercial corridor are especially susceptible to seasonal ant invasions.

faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in West Brighton?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in West Brighton typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in West Brighton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: West Brighton properties commonly experience pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older West Brighton homes. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment method.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant control service in West Brighton?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day ant control service throughout West Brighton and Staten Island. Most treatments take 1-2 hours to complete, and you'll notice a significant reduction in ant activity within 24-48 hours. Follow-up visits are scheduled as needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets in West Brighton homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, family-safe ant control products specifically chosen for residential West Brighton properties. Our targeted gel baits and barrier treatments pose minimal risk to children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We provide clear safety instructions and can accommodate specific concerns about sensitive family members.
